feed.title: QR-based signing flow payloads in Miniscript context

entry.title: QR-based signing flow payloads in Miniscript context
entry.summary:
The recent publication on Delving Bitcoin introduces a set of proposed payloads specifically designed for QR-based signing flows within the Miniscript framework. The detailed post, which can be accessed [here](https://delvingbitcoin.org/t/qr-based-signing-flow-payloads-in-miniscript-context/2464), focuses on the content of these payloads while deliberately remaining neutral regarding the wire format, framing, and chunking aspects.
The author invites feedback on this initiative, particularly from individuals involved in developing signing devices or managing wallets/coordinators that support or intend to support Miniscript. This call for input underscores the importance of collaborative development and refinement in the cryptocurrency technology space. The contribution is aimed at enhancing operational efficiency and security in Bitcoin transactions through improved QR-based signing processes. This engagement with the community is crucial for gaining practical insights and fostering advancements that benefit a broader user base.
